data.body:
## Description

In `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-list.sh`, replace the for-loop (lines 69-105) that spawns a separate `python3 ticket-reducer.py` per ticket directory with a single call to `python3 "$REDUCER" --batch "$TRACKER_DIR"`. The default JSON format path feeds the batch output directly (it's already a JSON array). The LLM format path pipes the batch output into ticket-llm-format.py line by line.

The ghost-ticket fallback logic (lines 96-103) moves entirely to the Python batch reducer — it is deleted from ticket-list.sh since `reduce_all_tickets()` handles None returns internally.

## File Impact
- Modify: `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-list.sh`

## TDD Requirement
TDD exemption: Integration exemption criterion 1 — the integration surface is fully covered by 8 existing tests in `tests/scripts/test-ticket-list.sh`:
1. test_ticket_list_returns_all_tickets
2. test_ticket_list_empty_system
3. test_ticket_list_has_required_fields
4. test_ticket_list_ghost_ticket_in_output
5. test_ticket_list_corrupt_create_event
6. test_ticket_list_llm_format_jsonl
7. test_ticket_list_llm_format_shortened_keys
8. test_ticket_list_llm_format_empty_tracker
These cover the exact behavioral output contract. All must remain GREEN without modification.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py
- [ ] All 8 existing ticket-list tests pass (behavioral equivalence preserved)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-list.sh 2>&1 | grep -c 'PASS' | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] ticket-list.sh calls reducer exactly once (batch mode, no per-ticket loop)
  Verify: grep -c 'python3.*ticket-reducer' plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-list.sh | awk '{exit ($1 != 1)}'
